name: education digest: produces identical json for identical inputs
command:
cat > d.jsonl <<'JEOF'
{"source_id":"aws-well-architected","section_id":"s1","pillar":"security","curriculum_phase":"2","delta_class":"best_practice_updated","summary":"IAM update","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
{"source_id":"terraform-docs","section_id":"stacks","pillar":"operational-excellence","curriculum_phase":"4","delta_class":"new_technology","summary":"Stacks GA","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir o1 --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir o2 --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
diff o1/2026-06-08T120000Z.json o2/2026-06-08T120000Z.json >/dev/null && echo reproducible 1>&2
